LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT BAY AREA AIR QUALITY MANAGEMENT DISTRICT'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS IS GRANTED. UNDER CCP SECTION 415.30, SERVICE IS DEEMED COMPLETE ON THE DAY THE ACKNOWLEDGMENT FORM IS EXECUTED AND RETURNED. WHERE DEFENDANT REFUSES TO SIGN THE ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF RECEIPT, PLAINTIFF MAY ATTEMPT TO EFFECT SERVICE IN SOME OTHER MANNER AND HOLD DEFENDANT LIABLE FOR THE COSTS. CCP SECTION 415.30. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797
